identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a 'Lens of Truth' aesthetic that visually separates reality from fabrication. Use high-contrast technical layouts, scanning motifs, and glassmorphism.

rules: Body: DM Sans. High legibility. Leading-relaxed.
Data/Code: JetBrains Mono. Use for accuracy scores, hash IDs, and technical specs.

inputs.base: rounded-sm border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

motion.scroll: Use Framer Motion 'whileInView' with viewport margin '-100px'.
motion.hover: Scale 1.02 on hover for cards. Text color shift for links.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. CLEANUP: Delete contents of 'App.css' and rely on Tailwind classes.
3. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to 'public/index.html' head.
4. THEME: Implement a 'ThemeProvider' context that manages 'dark' class on HTML element. Persist to localStorage.
5. NAVIGATION: Create a sticky glassmorphic header.
6. UPLOAD ZONE: Create a large, dashed-border dropzone with a 'scanning' animation effect (moving gradient).
7. RESULTS: Display Accuracy Score using a radial progress or large bold number. Use Green for Real, Pink for AI.
8. COMPARISON: If comparison view is requested, build a slider (Before/After) component.
9. ICONS: Use Lucide-react icons. NO EMOJIS.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Don't center everything. Use asymmetry for interest.
Use 2-3x more spacing than default (e.g., p-8 instead of p-4).
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG AA.
